result.evidence_summary: The Great Glen Nordic Race Series, called 'Nordic Meisters,' is detailed on the official Great Glen Trails Outdoor Center website with a dedicated page describing an 8-week Tuesday series of timed Nordic ski, snowshoe, and fatbike races from early January to early March, including age-graded results posted online and in the Conway Daily Sun. The events page lists it explicitly for 2026 with dates January 6 - March 3. An independent review confirms Great Glen Trails as a real Nordic skiing venue in New Hampshire with groomed trails.
